name: clinical-reports
tagline: Reference/template skill for writing clinical case, diagnostic, trial, and patient reports per CARE/ICH-E3/HIPAA standards.
verdict: Well-organized reference covering CARE, ICH-E3, HIPAA and standard report templates. Main risk: it MANDATES routing every report through a third-party AI image API (OpenRouter/'Nano Banana Pro') for a figure, in tension with its own PHI/de-identification warnings, and depends on an unbundled external skill. File is also 2x over the size budget, with no negat

highlights.summary: Lines 34-49: 'MANDATORY... not optional' figure generation sends diagram descriptions to an external AI image service (Nano Banana Pro via OpenRouter) for every report, despite the skill's own HIPAA/d
Repeated forceful directive language ('⚠️ MANDATORY', 'This is not optional', lines 34-36) pressures the agent into an external network call regardless of context or user intent — a soft manipulation

Stated purpose is clinical report writing, but lines 34-36 mandate an unrelated third-party AI image-generation step for every single report, exceeding the documentation-writing scope and forcing netw
